analysis:
## Trade Recommendations

**Best CSP:** NVDA $195 strike, **2026-07-17**, 34 DTE, $5.40/$5.50, Δ0.32, 30.0% annualized
- Excellent IVP 97% + quality stock above 200MA

**Best Position Income CC:** NVDA $215 strike, **2026-07-24**, 41 DTE, $7.25/$7.45, Δ0.40, 31.9% annualized  
- Light position with huge profit cushion (avg cost $100.72)

**LEAPS:** None recommended - all showing "WAIT - AT LOWS" trend signals due to recent weakness

**Bull Call Spreads:** None available

**IVP Environment:** Mixed volatility with NVDA (97%) and MSFT (91%) showing exceptional premiums, while most other names moderate (50-80%). Quality stocks pulling back creating good CSP opportunities.
